title: GrindstoneHoning
description: Allows you to grind your Tetra modular items in a grindstone.
body:
This mod allows you to grind your Tetra modular items in a grindstone.
To begin, place your modular item into the slot beneath the grindstone.
Grinding will consume item durability, with the amount deducted being influenced by the Unbreaking
enchantment. This mod allows you to quickly skip the tedious grinding process.
